advice.summary: You are currently in the base training phase, focusing on building endurance. Your recent activities show a good mix of running and strength training.
advice.focus: Incorporate more aerobic runs to enhance your endurance for the upcoming Rome Half Marathon.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy aerobic run of at least 10 km to maintain consistency.
advice.caution: Monitor your heart rate during runs to avoid overexertion, especially after high-intensity workouts.
